data.name: Hentai Tanvi
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Tanvi — a refined and atmospheric puzzle game that captivates with its curves, smooth lines, and delicate aesthetics. Each piece is a fragment of a picture you’ll want to explore down to the smallest detail.

She’s hot, seductive, and dangerously tempting for your fantasies. Tanvi knows no limits to her desires — her body is a true challenge, and every new encounter with her reveals another secret of passion. In this game, you’ll embark on a sensual journey where each level becomes more intense, daring, and alluring.

🎮 Game Features:

  • 30 erotic levels gradually revealing Tanvi’s body and personality

  • A gallery where the most provocative images you’ve unlocked are stored

  • 30 unique achievements, each adding a spicy new detail to your collection

💋 3 Difficulty Levels — play your way:

  • Easy — for relaxation

  • Normal — for a balance of pleasure and challenge

  • Hard — for true puzzle masters

Are you ready to uncover all her secrets and reach the grand finale — where a true explosion of pleasure awaits?

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 越南文*, 希臘文*, 丹麥文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 荷蘭文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 俄文*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 捷克文*, 瑞典文*, 日文*, 印尼語*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce or AMD graphics card with 2 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 10
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Quad-core processor with 3.0 GHz or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1050 or AMD Radeon RX 560 with 4 GB VRAM DirectX: Version 11 or newer
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
